! Note: I do not and can not control what the bot says. If it's not working, that is not my fault. I can't control if the bot is talking for you or acting up. Do not give a dislike for something I can't control. Thank you !

Want to request a bot?

REQUEST FORM IS IN MY BIO! RULES FOR REQUESTING ARE ALSO LISTED THERE!

I had a random idea. This bot was said idea. I think it's really funny to have Scaramouche and Tartaglia's relationship just be either constant fighting or making out tbh.

Fun fact: I used to despise the ginger. Like absolutely despise him.

Also I'm really really close to 400!!!!!
